# J.B. Hagjer Degree College, Umrongso

> Government-aided degree college in Umrongso, Dima Hasao, Assam — established 1995, affiliated to Assam University, Silchar. Offers BA, BSc, BCom programmes to students from the tribal hill communities of North Cachar.

## Key pages

- [Home](/): Overview, latest notices, programs, principal's message.
- [About](/about): History, vision, location and affiliation.
- [Principal's Message](/principal): Message from the Principal-in-Charge.
- [Admission 2026–27](/admission): Step-by-step admission flow via Samarth Portal, eligibility, documents, helpdesk.
- [Notices](/notices): Latest announcements and circulars.
- [Courses](/courses): UG programmes (BA / BSc / BCom) with subject combinations.
- [Departments](/departments): Academic departments and offerings.
- [Faculties](/faculties): Faculty members and teaching staff.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Campus, events and cultural photographs.
- [Achievements](/achievements): Awards, recognitions and milestones.
- [Contact](/contact): Address, phone, email and map.
